description: Grade 3 Mathematics learning areas for number work and problem solving.

learningAreas.title: Addition
learningAreas.description: Build confidence adding numbers using place value and everyday examples.

learningAreas.title: Subtraction
learningAreas.description: Practise taking away, comparing numbers, and checking answers.

learningAreas.title: Multiplication
learningAreas.description: Explore equal groups, repeated addition, and simple times tables.

learningAreas.title: Division
learningAreas.description: Share items equally and solve simple division problems.
